name: Build
description: Implements the artifact from design specs: architecture, coding, integration, and packaging.

slots.name: Architect
slots.description: Plans the implementation task graph and system design.

slots.name: Coder
slots.description: Implements individual tasks from the architect's plan.

slots.name: Copywriter
slots.description: Writes user-facing copy, documentation, and content.

slots.name: Packager
slots.description: Assembles the final artifact and manifest.
